self_improvement.claim: Architecture will route retained value versus Forge handoff more consistently because the Decide step now resolves that split in code.
self_improvement.mechanism: The adoption resolver combines review result, readiness gates, artifact selection, completion status, and Forge threshold logic in one canonical path.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this helper, Architecture review could pass while adoption versus Forge handoff remained partly implicit across prose and checker expectations.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future Decide-step work will produce more consistent stay-experimental versus adopt versus Forge-handoff outcomes.
self_improvement.verification_notes: The adoption-artifact builder and cycle-decision summary lane now consume the canonical adoption resolver.

decision.rationale: The mechanism passed review, met adoption readiness, and remains valuable as Directive-owned Architecture output.
decision.forge_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
